name: @tradewinds/codegen
description: Build-only codegen for the tradewinds TypeScript SDK. Reads schemas/*.json + schemas/json/*.json (emitted by Python scripts/export_schemas.py) and produces .d.ts types, ajv-standalone validators, and typed data modules into packages-ts/*/src/**/generated/. Private — not published to npm.

scripts.codegen: node -e "console.log('@tradewinds/codegen placeholder — implementation lands in TS-W0 Wave 3')"
